```{r prep packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

source("./prius2/scripts/helper_functions.R")
```

```{r prep memory}
# rm(list = ls())
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("read_species_list")))
```

```{r}
raw <- read_excel("./prius2/temp/criterium_impact_v26-02-06.xlsx",
                  sheet = 1)
```

```{r}
imp <- raw %>% 
  transmute(soort,
            GBIF_code,
            natuur = na_if(natuur, "NA"),
            volksgezondheid = na_if(volksgezondheid, "NA"),
            veiligheid = na_if(veiligheid, "NA"),
            infrastructuur = na_if(infrastructuur, "NA"),
            socioeconomisch = na_if(socioeconomisch, "NA")
  )
```

```{r}
write_csv(imp, "./prius2/temp/criterium_impact_v26-03-12.csv")
```
